name: Local Failure-Mode Review for {target}
description: Enumerate realistic local failure modes and missing guardrails from existing code and tests only.
prompt_template:
Review the local {target} engine for failure modes that existing code and tests might miss.

Read:
- engines/{target}/src/*.py
- engines/{target}/tests/
- engines/{target}/contracts.py

Limit yourself to concrete local risks:
- stale assumptions
- missing validation branches
- error paths that likely fail silently
- test gaps around already-existing behavior

Do not invent Arabic-domain judgments or new product design. Use action_items only for bounded follow-up work.
